understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to navigate the level by moving the controllable piece(s) on the 3-pixels-per-cell grid, likely to reach goal tile(s) (the + markers) and/or position pieces/blocks appropriately to complete the level within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction unless blocked; a move could fail with no position change when an adjacent obstacle prevented motion. Multiple selectable pieces existed and control could be switched instantly using CLICK on a selectable’s exact pixel position. Some adjacent objects could be pushable (moving together with the selected piece when pushed), while walls/solid boundaries could block movement; the 'blocked' hint was only heuristic and needed confirmation by attempting moves.

history.summary: Turn 1: CLICK | All adjacent directions are walled for the current piece; try switching control to the other selectable to see if it has a path.
history.reasoning: All adjacent directions are walled for the current piece; try switching control to the other selectable to see if it has a path.

history.summary: Turn 2: MOVE_RIGHT | All directions are marked blocked by walls, but the heuristic can be wrong; test movement to see if any wall side allows sliding or overlap.
history.reasoning: All directions are marked blocked by walls, but the heuristic can be wrong; test movement to see if any wall side allows sliding or overlap.

history.summary: Turn 3: CLICK | All moves from this selectable are blocked by walls, so switch back to the other selectable to continue exploring for a path to the goal.
history.reasoning: All moves from this selectable are blocked by walls, so switch back to the other selectable to continue exploring for a path to the goal.

history.summary: Turn 4: CLICK | This selectable is enclosed by walls on all four sides, so switch control to the other selectable that still has a known open direction.
history.reasoning: This selectable is enclosed by walls on all four sides, so switch control to the other selectable that still has a known open direction.

history.summary: Turn 5: CLICK | We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides with this selectable; switch back to the other piece to explore for an opening toward the goal.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides with this selectable; switch back to the other piece to explore for an opening toward the goal.

history.summary: Turn 6: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear fully enclosed by walls, so test whether the wall collision is strict or has a wrap/clip behavior by attempting to move right into it.
history.reasoning: We appear fully enclosed by walls, so test whether the wall collision is strict or has a wrap/clip behavior by attempting to move right into it.

history.summary: Turn 7: MOVE_RIGHT | All directions show adjacent wall, but the hint can be imperfect; try moving right to test for a hidden pass/teleport interaction.
history.reasoning: All directions show adjacent wall, but the hint can be imperfect; try moving right to test for a hidden pass/teleport interaction.

history.summary: Turn 8: MOVE_RIGHT | All four directions show adjacent wall; test whether the right wall is passable/teleporting by attempting to move into it.
history.reasoning: All four directions show adjacent wall; test whether the right wall is passable/teleporting by attempting to move into it.

history.summary: Turn 9: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear boxed in by walls, so test whether the adjacent selectable on the right can be pushed (or allows a swap) to make progress toward the goal area.
history.reasoning: We appear boxed in by walls, so test whether the adjacent selectable on the right can be pushed (or allows a swap) to make progress toward the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 10: CLICK | We’re fully enclosed by walls on all four sides, so movement won’t work; switch control to the other selectable to explore access to the goal.
history.reasoning: We’re fully enclosed by walls on all four sides, so movement won’t work; switch control to the other selectable to explore access to the goal.

history.summary: Turn 11: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving onto the adjacent goal tile to see if it triggers completion despite the wall hint.
history.reasoning: Try moving onto the adjacent goal tile to see if it triggers completion despite the wall hint.

history.summary: Turn 12: MOVE_LEFT | We appear enclosed by walls, but the goal area is immediately to the left; try moving onto it since goals are non-collidable and may allow overlap/exit.
history.reasoning: We appear enclosed by walls, but the goal area is immediately to the left; try moving onto it since goals are non-collidable and may allow overlap/exit.

history.summary: Turn 13: MOVE_UP | We are adjacent to the goal area; try moving onto it to see if it triggers completion despite the wall hint.
history.reasoning: We are adjacent to the goal area; try moving onto it to see if it triggers completion despite the wall hint.
